goal: Book a dental appointment for next Tuesday morning

turns.user: Hi, I'd like to book an appointment.
turns.agent: [warmly] Hello, thank you for calling our dental clinic! How can I help you book an appointment today? [happy] Hello, thank you for calling! I can certainly help you with that. What day and time would be best for your appointment?

turns.user: Do you have anything next Tuesday morning?
turns.agent: [thoughtful] Let me check that for you. Could you please tell me your full name?

turns.user: Actually, wait - how much does a cleaning cost?
turns.agent: A standard cleaning is one thousand five hundred rupees. Now, regarding your appointment for next Tuesday morning, could you please tell me your full name so I can book that for you?

turns.user: Okay, Tuesday 10am works. My name is Ricky.
turns.agent: [happy] Alright, Ricky. You're booked for Tuesday at ten AM, confirmed.
